title: Google OAuth Login Success
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in via Google OAuth and access the main dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Click on the Google OAuth login button.
Complete Google authentication with valid user credentials.
Verify redirection to the main dashboard and user session is established.

title: Google OAuth Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Check that login via Google OAuth fails gracefully when invalid credentials are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Attempt Google OAuth login with invalid or revoked credentials.
Verify that login is denied and an appropriate error message is displayed.

title: V1 Recipe AI Generation
description: Validate that the system generates a V1 free-form recipe using AI when provided with dish description input.

steps.description: Login as a valid user.
Navigate to new dish creation.
Enter dish description and trigger AI generation for V1 recipe.
Verify that AI returns a coherent V1 recipe output.

title: Convert V1 Recipe to Structured V2 Techcard
description: Ensure V1 AI-generated free-form recipes convert accurately into structured V2 techcards compliant with IIKO format.

steps.description: Generate or import a V1 recipe for a dish.
Initiate recipe conversion to V2 techcard.
Verify that the resulting V2 techcard includes detailed ingredients, portions, and conforms to schema.

title: AI Auto-Assignment of Ingredients to IIKO Catalog
description: Test that AI correctly auto-maps ingredients in techcards to IIKO catalog items and assigns unique article codes without collisions.

steps.description: Load techcard with ingredients missing IIKO article codes.
Trigger AI auto-mapping to assign IIKO catalog articles.
Verify all ingredients have valid article codes and no duplicates or conflicting codes exist.

title: IIKO Cloud API Import Product Catalog
description: Verify seamless import of product catalogs from IIKO Cloud API into the platform.

steps.description: Initiate import request to IIKO Cloud API.
Confirm product catalog data is successfully fetched and stored, matching IIKO source.

title: IIKO Cloud API Export Dish Skeleton Files
description: Ensure generated techcard dish skeleton export files are correctly formatted and upload-ready for IIKO RMS.

steps.description: Create a complete V2 techcard with valid data.
Trigger export in IIKO-compatible skeleton format.
Validate that the exported files meet IIKO RMS file format specifications.

title: Export Multi-format Files: XLSX, PDF, HTML, ZIP
description: Test the export functionality produces Excel, PDF, HTML files and bundles them into a ZIP archive accurately.

steps.description: Prepare a finalized techcard with nutritional and cost data.
Initiate export in all supported formats.
Verify all formats are generated, correct in content and format, and the ZIP archive contains all files.

title: Nutrition and Cost Calculation Accuracy
description: Verify the platform calculates nutritional values and dish cost correctly for given ingredients and portions.

steps.description: Input or import techcard with known ingredient quantities.
Trigger nutrition and cost calculation modules.
Validate that calculated nutrition and cost match expected values from catalogs.

title: HACCP Process Integration in Techcards
description: Check that Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) data is properly integrated and maintained within techcards.

steps.description: Create or import techcard and add HACCP data.
Verify HACCP critical points are saved, displayed, and included in exports.

title: User Data Isolation and Access Control
description: Ensure that users can only access their own techcards, menus, and data; no cross-user data leakage occurs.

steps.description: Login as User A and create test techcards.
Login as User B and attempt to access User A's techcards or menus.
Verify User B cannot view or access User A's data under any circumstances.

title: Frontend Loading States and Errors
description: Check that the frontend React app shows appropriate loading indicators, error messages, and prevents user confusion during backend operations.

steps.description: Trigger AI generation or export process.
Observe loading spinners or progress bars during processing.
Simulate backend failure or timeout during the process.
Verify clear error message displays and UI recovers gracefully.

title: Backend API Concurrency Control on AI Generation
description: Ensure backend AI generation endpoints enforce controlled concurrency to prevent multiple simultaneous requests from the same user.

steps.description: From the same user session, send multiple AI generation requests concurrently.
Verify that only one request processes at a time and others are queued or rejected with appropriate responses.

title: Data Validation of Techcards Before Save and Export
description: Verify that techcards undergo strict validation rules to ensure data integrity and export readiness before saving or exporting.

steps.description: Attempt to save or export techcard with missing or invalid required fields.
Verify that validation errors are displayed and operation is blocked until issues fixed.
Save or export techcard after correcting all errors.
Confirm operation succeeds without errors.

title: Handling IIKO API Unavailability
description: Ensure the system handles IIKO RMS API downtime gracefully with user alerts and fallback mechanisms.

steps.description: Simulate IIKO API being unavailable during import or export request.
Verify that the frontend displays an appropriate alert and backend logs the error.
Confirm that no data corruption or incomplete operations occur.

title: User Role-Based Access Control
description: Validate that user roles are enforced correctly to restrict or grant access to features according to permissions.

steps.description: Login with a user account having limited role access.
Verify UI elements and API endpoints are restricted according to role.
Login with admin or elevated role.
Confirm access to all features is granted.

title: Performance Benchmark: AI Generation Time
description: Measure AI generation response times and verify they meet predefined thresholds ensuring smooth user experience.

steps.description: Request AI generation for various recipe sizes.
Verify response times are within acceptable limits and no timeouts occur.

title: Database Query Isolation and Performance
description: Test that MongoDB queries correctly isolate user data and perform efficiently under load.

steps.description: Simulate multiple users querying techcards and menus simultaneously.
Verify no user data leakage and query response times remain within acceptable performance thresholds.

title: Frontend UI Responsiveness Across Viewports
description: Ensure the React SPA UI is fully responsive and functions correctly on various device screen sizes.

steps.description: Access the app from desktop, tablet, and mobile viewport sizes.
Verify layout adapts correctly, modals and loading states display properly, and no overflow or truncation issues exist.

title: Logging and Debugging Information Availability
description: Verify that important events, errors, and warnings during AI generation, export, and integration are logged and accessible for debugging.

steps.description: Perform various operations such as AI generation, export, and IIKO API calls.
Check backend logs contain detailed, timestamped entries and frontend console messages provide relevant information.
